channel.title: D&D With Brian and Friends – Imps
channel.description: Recent content in Imps on D&D With Brian and Friends

item.title: Biff
item.description: Biff is Max’s right-hand imp. He is gruff, with a thick cockney-like accent.

item.title: Max
item.description: Max is the defacto leader of the imps, popular among most of them and has earned their loyalty through his own deeds. He has been described as “very cool”. His right-hand man, best friend, and most trusted ally among the imps is Biff.
